zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor  Elizabeth Brereton於1406年11月1日出生在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可時，她的父親William Brereton55歲，母親Anyll de Venables43歲。她於1422年與John III Savage在英國英格蘭爾克里夫頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1495年11月22日在英國英格蘭爾盧可享年89歲，埋葬在英國爾普雷斯特波利馬可萊斯費爾德 聖 邁克爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor  Elizabeth Brereton于1406年11月1日出生在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可时，她的父亲William Brereton55岁，母亲Anyll de Venables43岁。她于1422年与John III Savage在英国英格兰爾克里夫頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1495年11月22日在英国英格兰爾盧可享年89岁，埋葬在英国爾普雷斯特波利馬可萊斯費爾德 聖 邁克爾。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor  Elizabeth Brereton was born on 1 November 1406, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, her father, William Brereton, was 55 and her mother, Anyll de Venables, was 43. She married John III Savage in 1422, in Clifton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. She died on 22 November 1495, in Runcorn, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89, and was buried in Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor  Elizabeth Brereton est née le 1 novembre 1406, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Brereton, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Anyll de Venables, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé John III Savage en 1422, à Clifton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 novembre 1495, à Runcorn, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor  Elizabeth Brereton am 1. November 1406 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Brereton 55 und ihre Mutter Anyll de Venables 43. Sie hat 1422 in Clifton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom John III Savage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. November 1495 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Runcorn, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor  Elizabeth Brereton è nata il il 1 novembre 1406 nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, sua padre, William Brereton, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Anyll de Venables, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato John III Savage nel 1422, nel Clifton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì il 22 novembre 1495, nel Runcorn, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor  Elizabeth Breretonが1406年11月1日にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックで生まれた時，父William Breretonは55歳，母Anyll de Venablesは43歳であった。1422年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアクリフトンでJohn III Savageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1495年11月22日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアルンコルンで89歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーマククレスフィールド スト ミチャエルにて埋葬された。

ko.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: 영국 체실르 프레스트버이 맥클스필드 스트 믹하얼
ko.Macclesfield Forest with Wildboarclough,: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프레스트버이 맥클스필드 포레스트 위스 윌드보르c루그h
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor  Elizabeth Brereton(이)가 1406년 11월 1일 영국 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Brereton(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anyll de Venables(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 클리프턴에서 John III Savage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 11월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 런코른에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 프레스트버이 맥클스필드 스트 믹하얼에 묻혔다.

pt.1 November 1406–22 Nov 1495: 1 de novembro de 1406–22 de novembro de 1495
pt.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra
pt.Macclesfield Forest with Wildboarclough,: Macclesfield Forest with Wildboarclough, Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor  Elizabeth Brereton nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1406, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Brereton, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Anyll de Venables, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com John III Savage em 1422, em Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1495, em Runcorn, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Draycott in the Moors, Staffordshire, En: дреикотт ин т мурс, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: макклесфиелд ст мачаел, престбури, чешир, Англия
ru.Macclesfield Forest with Wildboarclough,: макклесфиелд форест вит уаилдбоарклоую, престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor  Elizabeth Brereton родилась 1 ноября 1406 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Brereton было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Anyll de Venables, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John III Savage в 1422 г. в местности клифтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 22 ноября 1495 г. в местности рункорн, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности макклесфиелд ст мачаел, престбури, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor  Elizabeth Brereton nació el 1 de noviembre de 1406, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Brereton, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Anyll de Venables, tenía 43 años. Se casó con John III Savage en 1422, en Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1495, en Runcorn, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
